description: You are managing the exercise catalog for a gym using wger fitness manager (http://localhost). Log in using the credentials (Username: admin, Password: adminadmin) and attach the instructional video at https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wYREQkVtvEc to the standard 'Deadlift' exercise in the global database. Ensure the video is linked to the standard 'Deadlift' and not variations like 'Romanian Deadlift'.
